_note: Editable rate table read by scripts/video.py. transcription_per_min = USD per minute of audio. model_per_mtok = USD per 1,000,000 tokens. Update as provider prices drift. Seeded June 2026.

frame._comment: Frames are downscaled to this width before the agent reads them. Claude vision tokens ~= (w*h)/750, so width bounds the dominant cost.
